definitions: 实现；完成（尤指较难的事情或目标）

examples.text: But in reality, living to this age or beyond is a feat that very few, maybe even no humans, are likely to accomplish. Human bodies just aren't built for extreme aging. Our capacity is set at about 90 years.
examples.explanation: 这里的 accomplish 表示“实现、做到”。句子意思是：活到这个年龄甚至更久，是一件极少数人、甚至可能没有人类能做到的事。

source.text: 我们身体为何会老化？ - 莫妮咔 玛抐斯妮
